'''Septaas''' was an operative of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Special Intelligence]].

He was seconded to the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Harrow/Legends|''Harrow'']] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Marl Semtin/Legends|Marl Semtin]]. Septaas was [[Tatooine Campaign|betrayed]] by Semtin and eventually joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
As is the case with his compatriot [[Sixtus Quin]], Septaas' name seems to be based on Latin numerals, in this case ''septus'' "the seventh".

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 11|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 11]] {{1st}}
